postalAddress.value: Freepost Parliament: Private Bag 18 888, Parliament Buildings, Wellington 6160
postalAddress.notes: National Party contact page lists a Freepost Parliament postal address (also lists Masterton office street address: 6 Lincoln Road, Masterton).

donationMethod.details: No public, MP-specific donation method found; National Party provides a party donation form.
donationMethod.notes: National Party site uses a central party donation page.

aiInvolvement.notes: Quick scan of available public profile/contact pages did not mention AI or artificial intelligence.

sourcesChecked.notes: Parliament page returned HTTP response code failure in Playwright (likely Radware/bot protection); could not access contact details.
Found Freepost Parliament postal address (and Masterton office street address).
